name: Ice Cream Flowerpots with Worms
recipeIngredient: 4 clear plastic cups, about 3 to 4-inches high
1 cup flaked coconut, tinted with green food coloring
recipeInstructions:
1. Place about 2 tablespoons of chocolate wafer crumbs in the bottom of each cup.
2. Add 1/2 cup chocolate ice cream and press down with the back of a spoon.
3. Place 2 gummy worms in each cup on the outside edge.
4. Top with another 1/2 cup of chocolate ice cream.
5. Sprinkle 2 more tablespoons of chocolate crumbs over the ice cream.
6. Sprinkle 1/4 cup green coconut over the crumbs for grass.
7. Press a plastic straw into the center of each cup for the stem.
8. Place the cups in the freezer and let chill until firm.
Make flowers with toothpicks, candy, and cookies. To serve, press the "flower" into the straw and press a jelly candy spearmint leaf into each pot along the stem.
